The latest announcement is out from Dashan Education Holdings Limited ( (HK:9986) ).

Dashan Education Holdings Limited has announced the composition of its board of directors and the roles they will play within the company. The board includes executive directors Mr. Li Jing and Mr. Shan Jingchao, and independent non-executive directors Dr. Xie Xiangbing, Ms. Wang Yanxiao, and Mr. You Huanyu. The board has also established four standing committees: Audit, Nomination, Remuneration, and Investment Management, with specific directors assigned as chairpersons or members. This announcement clarifies the governance structure of the company, potentially impacting its strategic direction and operational oversight.

An announcement from Platt Nera International Limited ( (HK:1949) ) is now available.

Platt Nera International Limited announced the successful passing of a resolution at its Extraordinary General Meeting held on December 3, 2025. The resolution involves a share consolidation where every five issued and unissued ordinary shares will be consolidated into one share, effectively changing the par value from HK$0.01 to HK$0.05. This move is aimed at streamlining the company’s share structure and potentially enhancing shareholder value.

Cherish Sunshine International Limited ( (HK:1094) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Cherish Sunshine International Limited has announced the formation of a joint venture company in Shanghai with Xinhui Yuanheng, focusing on the photovoltaic industry. The joint venture will have a registered capital of RMB120 million, with Cherish Sunshine’s subsidiary Chengguang Zhongcai contributing 37.5% and Xinhui Yuanheng contributing 62.5%. As a minority shareholder, Cherish Sunshine will not consolidate the joint venture’s financial results into its own statements, indicating a strategic move to expand its market presence without impacting its current financial structure.

The company is involved in the sales of batteries, intelligent power transmission and distribution equipment, and other electronic components, with a market focus on technology development and consultation.

Pony AI Inc. ( (HK:2026) ) has issued an announcement.

Pony AI Inc. announced the conclusion of the stabilization period for its Global Offering on December 3, 2025, with Goldman Sachs (Asia) L.L.C. acting as the Stabilizing Manager. The stabilization actions included over-allocations of Class A Ordinary Shares and borrowing shares to cover these over-allocations. The over-allotment option was not exercised and has lapsed. This announcement highlights the company’s compliance with Hong Kong’s regulatory requirements and the challenges posed by its weighted voting rights structure, which may impact shareholder influence.

The latest announcement is out from Dashan Education Holdings Limited ( (HK:9986) ).

Dashan Education Holdings Limited announced the resignation of Mr. Zhang Hongjun from his roles as Executive Director and Chairman, among other positions, effective December 1, 2025. The resignation is due to Mr. Zhang’s desire to focus on other commitments, and there were no disagreements with the Board.
